title: Analysis For HR Digital Transformation Strategy
author: Yusuf Ricky, Carel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of the digital transformation of Human Resources (HR) within organizations. The focus is on the integration of HR strategy with business and digital strategies to maintain competitive advantage. The paper dig into the role of HR in digital transformation, the digitization of HR processes, and the core strategies for HR innovation. It also examines the expanded roles of HR in the digital era and identifies the challenges and opportunities presented by digital transformation. Through this analysis, the paper highlights the critical importance of continuous innovation and adaptability in HR to support organizational goals in the digital age.
